title: Ancient coupling likely more between human females, Neanderthal males
description: NEW YORK — Humans and Neanderthals cozied up from time to time when they lived in the same areas tens of thousands of years ago. But we don’t know much about who got with whom, or why.

title: Tiny Fossil Teeth in Colorado Expand the Range of the Earliest Known Primate
description: Learn how newly discovered Purgatorius fossils in Colorado’s Denver Basin are filling gaps in the Paleocene fossil record and clarifying early primate evolution after the dinosaur extinction.
